description: Registry of third-party skills this machine should install alongside the skills authored in this repo. Run ./scripts/bootstrap.sh on a new machine to install everything in one go. When you run `npx skills add <repo> -s <skill>`, also append the entry here and push, or cross-machine sync breaks.

sources.note: Vercel's React + web UI review rules.
Cross-platform UI/UX design intelligence for production-grade interfaces.
Local repo search workflow for answering codebase questions.
Matt Pocock's workflow, planning, and coding skills (superpowers-overlapping ones removed).
Academic paper writing guidance for ML/CV/NLP papers.
HF dataset inspection and ML experiment tracking for RecSys work.
